mapper.select: SELECT LINK_ID AS linkId, SYSNAMEA AS sysnamea, PTPNAMEA_BAU AS ptpnameaBau, PTPNAMEA_PAU AS ptpnameaPau , SYSNAMEZ AS sysnamez, PTPNAMEZ_BAU AS ptpnamezBau, PTPNAMEZ_PAU AS ptpnamezPau FROM NIA.TB_TOPOLOGY WHERE ((SYSNAMEA = #{sysname} AND PTPNAMEA_BAU = #{ptpName}) OR (SYSNAMEA = #{sysname} AND PTPNAMEA_PAU = #{ptpName})) OR ((SYSNAMEZ = #{sysname} AND PTPNAMEZ_BAU = #{ptpName}) OR (SYSNAMEZ = #{sysname} AND PTPNAMEZ_PAU = #{ptpName}))

SELECT LINK_ID AS linkId, SYSNAMEA AS sysnamea, PTPNAMEA AS ptpnamea , SYSNAMEZ AS sysnamez, PTPNAMEZ AS ptpnamez FROM( SELECT LINK_ID, SYSNAMEA, SPLIT_PART(PTPNAMEA, '-', 1) AS S_PTPNAMEA, PTPNAMEA, SHELFA , SYSNAMEZ, SPLIT_PART(PTPNAMEZ, '-', 1) AS S_PTPNAMEZ, PTPNAMEZ, SHELFZ FROM NIA.TB_UNI_TOPOLOGY ) A WHERE ((SYSNAMEA = SPLIT_PART(#{sysname}, '-', 1) AND S_PTPNAMEA = SPLIT_PART(#{ptpName}, '-', 1) and SHELFA = SPLIT_PART(#{sysname}, '-', 2)) OR (SYSNAMEZ = SPLIT_PART(#{sysname}, '-', 1) AND S_PTPNAMEZ = SPLIT_PART(#{ptpName}, '-', 1) and SHELFZ = SPLIT_PART(#{sysname}, '-', 2))) LIMIT 1

SELECT TRUNK_ID AS trunkId, TRUNK_NAME AS trunkName, ROUTENUM AS routenum, SYSNAME AS sysname , UP_PTPNAME_BAU AS upPtpnameBau, UP_PTPNAME_PAU AS upPtpnamePau , DOWN_PTPNAME_BAU AS downPtpnameBau, DOWN_PTPNAME_PAU AS downPtpnamePau FROM NIA.TB_ROADM_TRUNK_REPEATER WHERE SYSNAME = #{sysname} AND (UP_PTPNAME_BAU = #{ptpname} OR UP_PTPNAME_PAU = #{ptpname} OR DOWN_PTPNAME_BAU = #{ptpname} OR DOWN_PTPNAME_PAU = #{ptpname})
SELECT LINK_ID, NODE_IDA, PORTA, NODE_IDZ, PORTZ FROM NIA.TB_E2E_TOPOLOGY WHERE ((NODE_IDA = #{nodeId} AND PORTA = #{port}) OR (NODE_IDZ = #{nodeId} AND PORTZ = #{port}))
